page_metadata.biotools__summary: Quality-value guided Short Read Assembler, created to take advantage of quality-value scores as a further method of dealing with error. Compared to previous published algorithms, our assembler shows significant improvements not only in speed but also in output quality.

Compared to previous published algorithms, our assembler shows significant improvements not only in speed but also in output quality.
